entry.title: Re: Review Booklet Designer (Concept and Adaptability) - CE2408
entry.content: When I open the app Manage KPIS and Reports, the button 'Review Booklet', next to 'Stories' is missing. We are using CE2408, and the roles in place. Any guesses?

entry.title: Re: Call Transaction CJ20n and jump on specific Milestone
entry.content:
Hi @Sandra_Rossi 

thank you for your reply. No, I didn't try it over BatchInput. I wanted to do it via the ABAP Statement 'Call Transaction CJ20n'. But there I can only give WBS Elements as Input but not Milestones etc.

entry.title: UI5 freestyle development in SAP Build Code with Joule
entry.content:
SAP Build Code, which focuses on pro-code development, offers a variety of GenAI functionalties to support the development process using CAP, HANA development, as well as UI5.

In this blog post, I'll focus on the freestyle aspect of UI5 development, demonstrating how to get started with a freestyle UI5 application. My aim is to showcase how Joule can be used to both accelerate the development and provide support for those who may not be UI5 experts to the very fingertips.

The following simple scenario will give you a glimpse into developing applications with SAP Build Code. Using the BTP Trial version you can currently setup a SAP Build Code instance to try Joule’s GenAI capabilities.

 

Getting Started

  1. Open the SAP Build Lobby from the BTP Subaccount Cockpit under Services > Instances and Subscriptions > SAP Build Code.
  2. Create a new SAP Build Code Fiori, Full-Stack, or Mobile application. For this scenario, a SAP Fiori Application is suitable.
  3. Enter a project name. If no dev space exists, it will be prefilled to create a new Fiori dev space:

4. Once the project is created and the SAP Business Application Studio (BAS) dev space starts, click on the project name to open BAS.

 

Creating a UI5 Application

Create a UI5 application using the template wizard in BAS:

  1. Go to Get Started > New Project from Template > SAP Fiori Generator
  2. Use the Basic template to start from scratch
  3. For the OData service, create a destination to the OData V2 as an example OData connection
  4.  Add a view name – In my case Main
  5. Optionally, set the deployment configuration and add the app to the managed application router if you want to deploy and consume the app from within SAP Build Work Zone

 

Leveraging Joule for UI5 Development

Recently, major UX updates were introduced to the Joule capabilities, moving from mainly being able to access Joule from the Guide Center towards a single chat, where users can use different slash commands to invoke tailored Joule functionalities.

For UI5 questions and development the /ui5 slash command is there to achieve this:

 

Example: Creating a Product Table

In the yet empty project, in order to see the /ui5 slash command, we firstly need to open the controller or view that was created from the template. Afterwards, the /ui5 slash command is suggested and we can directly start with a sample prompt to show products of the OData service:

"/ui5 create a table in the main view that displays the products of the northwind service. Provide data bindings to the properties of this odata entity."

After invoking the prompt, Joule already looked up files considered important for executing the task:

In the answer, Joule provided the code in the Main.view.xml including the product table. Since the screenshot of the whole response is large and thus difficult to paste here, this is the code it provided :

 

<mvc:View controllerName="demoapp.controller.Main"
    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc" displayBlock="true"
    xmlns="sap.m">
    <Page id="page" title="{i18n>title}">
        <content>
            <Table id="productTable" items="{
                path: '/Products'
            }">
                <headerToolbar>
                    <Toolbar>
                        <Title text="Products" />
                    </Toolbar>
                </headerToolbar>
                <columns>
                    <Column>
                        <Text text="Product ID" />
                    </Column>
                    <Column>
                        <Text text="Product Name" />
                    </Column>
                    <Column>
                        <Text text="Quantity Per Unit" />
                    </Column>
                    <Column>
                        <Text text="Unit Price" />
                    </Column>
                </columns>
                <items>
                    <ColumnListItem>
                        <cells>
                            <Text text="{ProductID}" />
                            <Text text="{ProductName}" />
                            <Text text="{QuantityPerUnit}" />
                            <Text text="{UnitPrice}" />
                        </cells>
                    </ColumnListItem>
                </items>
            </Table>
        </content>
    </Page>
</mvc:View>

 

As you can see, the suggestions looked good, also containing data binding to 4 properties of the Products entity. That already saves some manually coding time for developers and can be further adapted to include more columns and properties.

An explanation at the end is also provided:

Afterwards, the application can be previewed using the green play button in BAS for example. The result already looks promising:

 

Formatting and adding Functionality

Now, I wanted to format the Unit Price to make it look a little bit nicer and also display  the sign of the Euro currency after the number. Additionally, I wanted to create a custom column with some sort of action that can be invoked on each product. So, Joule was asked again:

"/ui5 format the unit price in the table to round to 2 decimals and include an euro sign after the number. Create a formatter file with a function for this. Additionally, include another column in the table named Order where each cell is composed of a button that indicated that the user wants to buy this product. Provide a basic press event handler one of this button is pressed."

Multiple files were suggested to be adapted and/or changed, such as creating a formatter.js file to format the UnitPrice property.

On top of that, it created a column Order, a function onPressOrder in the Main.controller.js file, and a press event in the Main.view.xml in order to show an UI5 MessageToast of the order placed for a certain product:

 

To further add some application logic, Joule assisted to create a condition when clicking the button:

“/ui5 please change the onOrderPress function that checks if the unit price of the product is above 50 €. If this is the case, show a message dialog indicating that the products above 50 € can currently not be ordered.“

Result, only when clicking a product over 50 (€):

 

Using AI-Powered Code Completion

Besides Joule, since very recently SAP Build Code introduced code completion and suggestions directly in the editor. Therefore, we can also make use of this AI feature.In order to show this, I added a comment in the onOrderPress code and described that I want to have a confirmation dialog instead of a message toast. Shortly after, a code suggestion was directly available in the function:

I had to remove the MessageToast line of code, but besides that, it immediately worked:

 

Understanding your Code with Joule

Coming to the end, one more thing to highlight: Using Joule to help explaining code. As such, the following prompt was sent: 

“/ui5 what does the main view do?”

Here is an extract of Joule’s answer, which helps to understand the code even further:

 

Conclusion

As you can see, SAP Build Code with Joule supports a variety of use cases for UI5 development, in addition to its other GenAI focus on CAP and Full-Stack development. Please keep in mind that prompt responses can vary, thus potentially leading to slighty different code proposals. Nonetheless, it's a powerful feature that can enhance your development process, whether you're an experienced UI5 developer or just getting started. Let’s see what the future brings with more and more features getting introduced!

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch Brisbane #1 - 14th November 2024
entry.content: Looking forward to it.  I'm at Oktoberfest at the German club this weekend 🍻 . So will have to bring some of the Oktoberfest spirit along with me.

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Developing and Transforming your ABAP Custom Code for Clean Core in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi @Ramjee_korada ,

the purpose of tier 2 is to cloud-enable not released APIs for ABAP cloud development in tier 1. After creating a custom wrapper you can release it for ABAP Cloud (switch the language version) and use in tier 1. The purpose of classic APIs for tier 3 is just to support your upgrade stability: if you still need to extend your classic developments in tier 3 you would rely on tier 3 Classic APIs. But the main development target is tier 1, and tier 2 is just supporting the cloud enablement of missing APIs for tier 1. The ATC checks for tier 2 and tier 3 Classic APIs will be also different.

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: How to develop cap application with external database (HANA cloud)
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have a scenario wherein I want to develop cap application in my trial account.

However I want the cap database (HANA cloud) to reside on Azure instance, outside my BTP trial global account.

Please let me know , its feasibility and the way to achieve this, if this is feasible.

Regards,

Trupti Mahurkar

entry.title: 🔵 Choosing the Right LLM for your Use Case: Accuracy, Cost, and Performance in the Balance
entry.content:
With the ever-growing list of large language models (LLMs) available in Generative AI Hub, selecting the best one for specific use cases can be a daunting task. This talk delves into our process of evaluating LLMs for running our use-case, Joule on the SAP Design System, focusing on three critical metrics: accuracy in answering questions, response speed, and query cost. Through this talk, we'll explore how we need to balance the needs of expert users and community members while addressing the demand for rapid, cost-effective, and accurate responses.

Speaker: Joerg Goeppert and Hee Tatt Ooi, SAP

entry.title: Re: Review Booklet Designer (Concept and Adaptability) - CE2408
entry.content:
Hi Santosh,

I am assuming you are in a public cloud system and your are using the role "Analytics_Specialist" without adaptations. In this case please create a ticket using the component CA-GTF-RB.

Kind Regards Stefan

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition: Options for Accounting Principles and Ledgers
entry.content:
I have 0L, 2L, 3L and 4G ledgers. The assignment of accounting principle to ledgers as below:

0L - Corporate accounting principle is blank and USAP assigned to company code 1710

2L - Corporate accounting principle is IFRS and IFRS assigned to company code 1710

3L - Corporate accounting principle is USGP and USGP assigned to company code 1710

4G - No accounting principle assigned.

I am trying to assign USGP to G4 ledger but getting below errors:

 1. No multiple accounting principle assignment without leading ledger 0L

Message no. FINS_ACDOC_CUST537

2.  Assign accounting principle USGP to leading ledger 0L as Corp AccPr.

Message no. FINS_ACDOC_CUST557

Please suggest me the solution on this

entry.title: Re: Custom field in Service Request not getting updated back to SAP Data Base
entry.content: Hi ,facing the same issue, did you find a solution for this?

entry.title: Re: Review booklet tab does not appear on manage kpis and...
entry.content:
Hello Risako, you need to have the catalogue 'SAP_CORE_BC_EXT_RVB_PC' in the role 'SAP_BR_ANALYTICS_SPECIALIST'. Also please refer to the two dependent catalogues SAP_BW_BC_AQD_PC and SAP_CA_BC_SSB_PC, which must also be assigned to the role. 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano , I’m new in SAP and try to explore my skills! I’ve completed learning journeys in "Designing Stories in SAP Analytics Cloud" and "Leveraging SAP Analytics Cloud Functionality for Enterprise Planning" and am now looking to further enhance my knowledge.

As I plan to pursue certification, I would greatly appreciate any support, such as a voucher, to assist with this next step. Additionally, I’m curious if there’s a platform where fellow learners and professionals connect? Any guidance on certifications and learning paths would be wonderful as I aim to contribute more to the SAP community and my organization.

Hello @MuditJain 

I suppose the function ATP_BOP_API_REQUIREMENTS_RUN implements Advanced Backorder Processing Run API.

Also see at SAP API Hub Advanced Backorder Processing Run

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Transforming legacy code to CAP with the help of GenAI

thanks for your question. Let me find an answer and get back to you! 🙂
Cheers, Kevin

entry.title: Re: First sync SAP MDK timeout
entry.content: Hello, Arun. Thank you for taking a time and answer me. After set timeout to 5 min, I could retrieve all the data. Have a good week!

entry.title: Re: Call Transaction CJ20n and jump on specific Milestone
entry.content:
Yes but AFAIK CJ20N only reads 3 parameters from memory for 'easy call'

 

    GET PARAMETER ID 'PSP' FIELD entry_data-pronr.
    GET PARAMETER ID 'PRO' FIELD entry_data-pspnr.
    GET PARAMETER ID 'ANR' FIELD entry_data-aufnr.

 

But it also read some data from shared bufer,

 

  IMPORT entry_data
         g_fcode
         g_template_object
         FROM SHARED BUFFER cnpb_indx(ed) ID sy-uname.

 

Try to export some data in this shared buffer before calling the transaction. (variables defined in top include of function group CNPB_M) - the transaction will read and delete the shared buffer.

NB: The buffer contains an instance of structure CNPB_TEMPLATE_OBJECT and a function code

So 

  • Analyze the initial PBO of the transaction
  • Perform some where used search on the information you get

entry.title: TR lists in CHARM - Post import in TST after system copy completed

entry.title: Re: Creating a popup with depending fields
entry.content: Hello Michael! Thanks for the Information. Unfortunately, the blog doesn't solve my Problem. I need a solution where the user either can only maintain the fields in the right order as the value range of field 2 depends on field 1 or I need to tell the user that he must maintain field 1 first, if he tries to enter a value in field 2 first. Do you know any solution to that?

entry.title: Re: Use of BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CHANGE to change a value in RBKP table
entry.content:
Also don't check value of sy-subrc after calling a BAPI, but check no error message in RETURN table parameter (LOOP for type E error message)

Correct also your code

 

LS_HEADER01-PMNT_BLOCK = ' '. 
LS_HEADER02-PMNT_BLOCK = 'X'.

entry.title: Re: JSON Schema for the Common Data Model - CDM
entry.content: @gregorw, did you find the schema yet? I'm also looking for it.

entry.title: Re: EWM-TM Integration with Advanced Shipping & Receiving functionality (ASR)
entry.content: Have you found a solution to this problem?

entry.title: Re: Cannot release transport request in ABAP Cloud Projec...
entry.content:
Hi Sebastian,

Please see ABAP Test Cockpit Configurator | SAP Help Portal for more information how to maintain the "Behavior on Transport Release" for ATC.

By default, the settings in your system are:

Block for Findings - On priority 1 and 2
Inform for Findings On priority 1 and 2

 

hope that helps,
 Ingo

entry.title: Re: Update Billing status on delivery (LIKP-FKSTK)
entry.content: Perfect, I had the same problem and this TCode worked.

entry.title: Re: JSON Schema for the Common Data Model - CDM
entry.content:
Hi @gregorw,

Is this what you are looking for: https://github.com/SAP-samples/build-workzone-integration/blob/main/standard/content-package-template/docs/cdm/introduction.md? 

For me it was 🙂

Kind regards,

Julian Kuipers

entry.title: Loipro creation user-exit
entry.content:

I would like to put some control logic (to modify an idoc field) during the creation of the loipro IDOC (currently, I use the rcclord program to create it).
Can someone tell me if there are any user-exit for this?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Developing and Transforming your ABAP Custom Code for Clean Core in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi @OlgaDolinskaja 

Thanks again!!

'After creating a custom wrapper you can release it for ABAP Cloud (switch the language version) and use in tier 1.' - This does not mean the overall code being executed for a business transaction is cloud ready but just the wrapper is marked for cloud ready with help of ATC exemption. 

Best wishes,
Ramjee Korada

Do you know how to transport these changes to QA and to be restricted to only certain key users?

entry.title: Re: First sync SAP MDK timeout
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

The OData API I’ve developed is quite simple, consisting of five endpoints:

  1. cust_Alunos – Retrieves student data.
  2. cust_Instrutores – Retrieves instructor data.
  3. cust_Cursos – Retrieves course data.
  4. cust_Turmas – Retrieves class data.
  5. cust_ListaDePresenca – Retrieves attendance lists for classes.

Here is one example of cust_Alunos, here I have 19k registers.

 Here are some tests I’ve done in postman:

 

 

 

 

 

 

As we can see, the entity cust_Alunos has taken 2m 23s to complete. How was it displayed in CPI?

 

 The five requests are there, completed. 

Now, let’s move on to the mobile app.

There isn’t much to showcase in the app at this stage. It consists of a single main page with buttons that navigate to different list pages, each displaying the data retrieved from the corresponding endpoint.

At this point, my primary goal is to verify that the data is being successfully retrieved. Here’s what the main page looks like:

 

I have this downloding progress when I open the app for the first time:

 

 

 After keep refreshing the CPI message page:

 

 

 

 

And then, the error showed up:

 

CPI:

 

Client log upload:

 

 

 For those who are getting the same error, I just did what Mr. @Arunachalam suggested. You can go directly to his answer, already marked as a solution.

I would like to thank everyone who take a time to make suggestion here.

entry.title: Re: Loipro creation user-exit
entry.content:
You can find it in SMOD under enhancement 'LOI00001'.  It is called several times during the generation of a LOIPRO IDoc with different inputs each time.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: BADI: Purchase order Workflow restart, Order Confirmation entered
entry.content:
In our system I've found that the _DB parameters are supplied only with data for changed items, so your old PO value will only be correct if all items were changed.

I've resorted to a local class which selects from the database and then replaces/supplies with data supplied to the Business Add-In. I wish I had a better solution, but I haven't come up with one yet. Since there is no distinction (as far as I have been able to find) between an unchanged item and a new item in PURCHASEORDERITEM etc the _DB parameters can't be initialized from the other parameters.

entry.title: SAP GRC Access Control – Access Request – User provisioning at item level
entry.content:
Hello,

We have an issue in our SAP GRC Access Control system for the user provisioning.

When a user is asking for multiples roles with multiple approvers, we have to wait that all approvers approved their role so that the provisioning is done.

If an approver is absent, the provisioning can be delayed because of that.

We would like that when one role is approved, this role is provisioned
In conclusion, we would like to provision at item level, not at request level.

Does anyone has an idea on how to fix it?

We already created a case but no solutions were found.               

Thanks

entry.title: How to host SAP PI/PO as a web service ?
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I am working on a scenario involving integration between an SAP system and a third-party system, where SAP PI/PO is used as the middleware. My objective is to provide the third-party sender with an API of SAP PI/PO, which they will use to send data. The data received by PI/PO will be passed on to an OData service developed by an ABAPer.

Requirements:

  • The third-party sender will call the PI/PO API to send data.
  • PI/PO will need to send this data to the OData service.
  • The OData service requires a CSRF token in the request headers when receiving data.

Since I am new to SAP PI/PO, I would appreciate some guidance on the following:

  1. API Creation in PI/PO:

    • How can I create and expose the API in SAP PI/PO for the third-party system to send data?
    • What are the steps to configure the communication channel and integration flow?

  2. Routing Data to OData Service:

    • What is the best way to route the data from PI/PO to the OData service on the SAP backend?
    • Are there any specific configurations for the receiver communication channel to handle OData service calls?

  3. CSRF Token Handling:

    • The OData service requires a CSRF token to be included in the request headers.
    • How can I fetch the CSRF token from the OData service dynamically within PI/PO?
    • What is the recommended way to assign this token to the HTTP headers in PI/PO before sending the data to the OData service?

If anyone has experience with this type of integration, please share any best practices, detailed steps, or resources that can help me successfully implement this.


Best Regards, 

Prathmesh Sutar 
prathmeshsutar.sapcpi@gmail.com

entry.title: Notification in Financial Closing Cockpit
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

We are in the process of configuring financial closing cockpit for usage in our company. Even we have configured the email notification, we are not receiving any notifications. 

Please kindly give me a hint to resolve this...

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: My SAP journey begins ...
entry.content:

Welcome aboard! Thanks for writing.

You definitely have an interesting combination of skill sets that will make you a valuable contributor to our ecosystem!

entry.title: Re: Curious? Previewing the SAP Companion (formerly Web Assistant)
entry.content:
Hello @KristinaKunad ,

thank you so much for your feedback. Out of your feedback I unterstand, that when configuring SAP Companion for an application, there should be a config field where I can enter the prefered SAP Companion Framework. Either the "factory" or the "canary" (URL's mentioned in this note). But when I check the implementation guides, not all implementations have dedicated URL-fields for the SAP Companion framework. As a pattern see the implentation guide for SAP HANA Cloud Setting Up Manager as Content Server | SAP Help Portal. I can't see a field where to enter the prefered SAP Companion URL. Are not all SAP applications able to be switched to the preview-instance?
As example for integration of SAP Companion to SFSF I see the relevant field to be configured to the "outlook"-framework: Enabling SAP Companion for Custom Content | SAP Help Portal.

I hope my question is clear to you...

Thanks a lot again for your help.

Best regards

Peter

entry.title: Re: Consuming Data Exposed by SAP Datasphere via the OData API
entry.content:
Hi @lalitmohan ,

We have a scenario where we want to consume the SAP Datasphere APIs in the SAP BTP CAP Application as an ODATA service. We created an OAuth2.0 client like its mentioned in your blog. But there is a step in which it is mentioned that "To consume the exposed data in third-party clients requires an OAuth2.0 flow with type authorization_code. Users must manually authenticate against the configured IDP to generate the authorization code" 

We want to use the API in a system to system communication( from SAP Data Sphere to SAP CAP application) where in there wont be any UI screens involved. Can you please help us understand how to make this system to system call without UI interaction.?

entry.title: Extending app "Stock - multiple materials"
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a requirement to extend "stock - multiple materials", I was going through the app documentation, I have seen custom fields and logic available for this app in help documents as below.

App Extensibility: Stock - Multiple Materials | SAP Help Portal 

But I can't find them in my system. Attaching screenshot for reference.

I can't find business context: Stock - Multiple Materials in custom logic app and Master Data: Batch in custom field app.

Let me know if anyone faces similar issue.

Regards,

Jagadhatri

ABAP Extensibility #MM-FIO-IM-SGM

entry.title: Why Predictive Forecast is showing me "The training data source is empty" even if I have data?
entry.content:
Hi, 

 

I'm trying to run Predictive Scenario with Time Series Forecast. It's based on a planning model which has data for Actuals for 2022 and 2023 and I would like to make forecast for 2024.

I filled in all the data, but when I click on "Train & Forecast" I receive an error "

The training data source is empty. Please use another data source.' even if there are data.

Could you please help me to identify the cause of the issue? I have data in my model so I don't understant why it's not working.

 

Best regards,

Marta

entry.title: Re: Converting Internal table columns to rows
entry.content:
Solution!

DATA:
  cs_zsnps4va_t_dif TYPE glt0_bck,
  ls_flexa          TYPE v_faglflexa_ori,
  lt_flexa          TYPE TABLE OF v_faglflexa_ori.

cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-bukrs = 1710.
cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-tsl01 = -100.
cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-tsl02 = 200.
cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-tsl03 = 300.
cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-tsl04 = 400.
cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-hsl01 = -500.
cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-hsl02 = 600.
cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-hsl03 = 000.
cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-hsl04 = 800.
cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-ksl01 = -900.
cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-ksl02 = 1000.
cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-ksl03 = 1100.
cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-ksl04 = -1200.

DATA: lv_belnr TYPE belnr_d VALUE 'B000000000'.
SELECT *
  INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_tka02)
  FROM tka02
  WHERE bukrs = @CS_zsnps4va_t_dif-bukrs.

SELECT *
  INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_finsc_ld_cmp)
  FROM finsc_ld_cmp
  WHERE bukrs = @CS_zsnps4va_t_dif-bukrs
  AND   rldnr NE '0L'.

DO 12 TIMES.

  IF sy-index = 1 OR sy-index = 5 OR sy-index = 9.
    DATA(lv_index) = '01'.
    IF sy-index = 1.
      DATA(col) = 'TSL'.
    ELSEIF sy-index = 5.
      col = 'HSL'.
    ELSEIF sy-index = 9.
      lv_index = '01'.
      col = 'KSL'.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

  DATA(lv_field_s)  = |cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-{ col }{ lv_index }|.
  DATA(lv_field_t)  = |ls_flexa-{ col }|.

  CONDENSE: lv_field_s NO-GAPS,
            lv_field_t NO-GAPS.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_amt_s>.
  FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_amt_t>.
  ASSIGN (lv_field_s) TO <fs_amt_s>.
  ASSIGN (lv_field_t) TO <fs_amt_t>.

  " Check if the assignment was successful
  IF sy-subrc = 0 AND <fs_amt_s> IS NOT INITIAL.

    lv_belnr =  lv_belnr+1(9) + 1.
    UNPACK lv_belnr TO lv_belnr.
    lv_belnr = |B{ lv_belnr+1(9) }|.

*Add Values to Flexa
    ls_flexa-rbukrs = cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-bukrs.
    ls_flexa-kokrs = VALUE #(
                              lt_tka02[
                                        bukrs = cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-bukrs
                                      ]-kokrs OPTIONAL ).
    "Get the value dynamically
    <fs_amt_t> = <fs_amt_s>.
    ls_flexa-poper = lv_index.
    IF <fs_amt_t> > 0.
      ls_flexa-drcrk = 'S'.
      ls_flexa-bschl = '40'.
    ELSE.
      ls_flexa-drcrk = 'H'.
      ls_flexa-bschl = '50'.
    ENDIF.

    ls_flexa-docnr  = lv_belnr.
    ls_flexa-belnr  = lv_belnr.
    ls_flexa-docln  = '000001'.
    ls_flexa-buzei  = '001'.
    ls_flexa-rclnt = sy-mandt.
    ls_flexa-ryear = cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-ryear.
    ls_flexa-rbukrs = cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-bukrs.
    ls_flexa-racct = cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-racct.
    ls_flexa-rwcur = cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-rtcur.
    ls_flexa-gjahr = cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-ryear.
    ls_flexa-budat = sy-datum.
    ls_flexa-prctr = 'MIG1'.
    ls_flexa-rldnr = '0L'.
    ls_flexa-rtcur = cs_zsnps4va_t_dif-rtcur.
    ls_flexa-usnam = 'SNP_RFC'.
    GET TIME STAMP FIELD ls_flexa-timestamp.

    APPEND ls_flexa TO lt_flexa.

    DATA(lv_count) = lines( lt_finsc_ld_cmp ).
    DO lv_count TIMES.
      ls_flexa-rldnr = VALUE #(
                                lt_finsc_ld_cmp[
                                                sy-index
                                                ]-rldnr OPTIONAL ).
      APPEND ls_flexa TO lt_flexa.
    ENDDO.

  ENDIF.
  CLEAR: lv_field_s, lv_field_t,<fs_amt_t>.
  ADD 1 TO lv_index.
  IF lv_index < 10.
    lv_index = |0{ lv_index }|.
  ENDIF.
ENDDO.

Hamad

entry.title: Re: Hello!
entry.content:
Hi @Sonjash ,

Welcome aboard! Please check out How to figure out if your certification / learning content is free of charge

Also: A suggestion on how to approach networking and a career search in the SAP ecosystem

entry.title: Re: New 2H 2024 SAP Successfactors Time (Tracking) Features
entry.content:
Hello everyone.

Regarding the procedures "Employee Self Service for temporary change of work schedule" and "Employee Self Service for temporary change of public holiday calendar", will it be necessary to make any changes to the permissions or will they be automatically available to the employee? If it is at the permissions level, what permissions should the employee have? Will it be "maintain temporary changes"?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Why Predictive Forecast is showing me "The training data source is empty" even if I ha
entry.content: Hi Marta, I would suggest that you create a story on the same subset of data that the predictive scenario is using. Create a story on the same planning model and same set of data. This way you can double-check whether there is existing data. If there is and you are a licensed SAP Analytics Cloud customer I would suggest you to create a support ticket with SAP Support. Kind regrads Antoine

entry.title: Re: What does the 'Y' in 'YCOA' stand for? Something Chart of Accounts
entry.content:
Hi @danadiedrich ,

I believe certain letters are used as prefixes to differentiate between types of objects or to denote specific customizations. For example, the letters "Y" and "Z" might be used to indicate customer-specific or custom-developed objects (such as reports, fields, and charts of accounts) to distinguish them from standard SAP objects.

So, my assumption is that the "Y" typically means that the Chart of Accounts is customized according to the specific needs of the customer or organization using SAP, rather than being a standard, out-of-the-box configuration. 

Let's page our resident finance expert:
@Stefanos - can you confirm this? Or am I missing something?

entry.title: Re: Langchain Summarization Techniques: Leveraging Generative AI Hub via Custom Model
entry.content: Any Recommendation of file size or pages in Document  since it's mentioned not good for large documents?

entry.title: Re: Curious? Previewing the SAP Companion (formerly Web Assistant)

Hello @KristinaKunad ,

i would like to re-post my question:

After receiving the latest Companion newsletter I wanted to check out the Preview in our SAP S/4HANA on-premise system. Unfortunately it doesn't work. The links in this blog post differ from the links in the info center (https://enable-now.sap.com/ic/wa/ext/%7Etag/published/index.html?show=slide!SL_6CDFB53AC05E0DA0). Which link is correct and where in the configuration I have to put it in? Maybe it would be a good idea to take over this information in the Companion integration guide in a structured way? Thanks a lot.

One further question: where can I find the companion version in Fiori?

Thanks in advance and kind regards

Nicole

entry.title: H2_2024 > SPOTLIGHT VIEW is missing username & reports counts
entry.content:
As you can see in new release B2411 the username is no longer next to Display Name (no username (1xxxxxxx1) next to Alex SMITH)

we have also lost the count of reports / which was a quick and easy method to identify Managers in Directory or Global Search Results

@DianaLiden is it expected loss to not have report counts anymore in Spotlight view ?

report counts & username are KEY INFORMATION for daily usage of SuccessFactors

Is it planned that Joule can also be used in VS Code?

entry.title: SAP MDK - Entities, Navigations and Fields
entry.content:
Hello community,

I would like to share an issue I encountered with entities and their navigation fields.

I have two entities:

  • cust_Turmas: Retrieves data from a class.
  • cust_Instrutores: Retrieves data from instructors.

There is also a navigation from cust_Turmas to cust_Instrutores, which is called cust_Inst1Nav.

Here is the filter used to retrieve the data using OData:

$select:externalCode,externalName,cust_Inst1Nav/cust_fname,cust_Inst1Nav/cust_lname
$expand:cust_Inst1Nav
$filter:externalCode eq 235

The URL parameter is:

<BASE_URL>/?$select=externalCode,externalName,cust_Inst1Nav/cust_fname,cust_Inst1Nav/cust_lname&$expand=cust_Inst1Nav&$filter=externalCode eq 235

The data retrieved by the query is:

{
  "@odata.context": "$metadata#cust_Turmas",
  "value": [
    {
      "externalCode": "235",
      "externalName": "Course name",
      "cust_Inst1Nav": {
        "externalCode": "123",
        "cust_fname": "Victor",
        "cust_lname": "Cardoso"
      }
    }
  ]
}

I thought I could simply call the navigation fields as I do with the main entity. For example:

  • {externalCode} = Retrieves 235
  • {cust_Inst1Nav/cust_fname} = should retrieve Victor, but instead, it either returns blank or doesn’t exist.

However, the navigation fields are not being retrieved.

Is there something I'm missing?

This is my page:

page with header to show only one record

 

Here is my Target object configuration detailed.

my Target configurations

 I can see the fields inside entity "cust_Turmas" its navigation "cust_Inst1Nav" when I want to set a field value in my objects.

 I've created a rule to get me some clues and put in a field:

export default function checkEmpty(context) {
    let binding = context.binding;

    if (binding.cust_Inst1Nav) {
        if (binding.cust_Inst1Nav.cust_lname) {
            return binding.cust_Inst1Nav.cust_lname;
        } else {
            return 'No Last Name Available';
        }
    } else {
        return 'cust_Inst1Nav not available';
    }
}

The result is: cust_Inst1Nav not available 

I appreciate any comments/suggestions.

entry.title: Re: SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi @Erline ,

Great to see someone from Vower onboard! I've sent you an invite and will keep an eye out for your email.

entry.title: Re: Get min and max value in an internal table based on a sorting field
entry.content:
Solution!

DATA: cs_ekpo      TYPE ekpo,
      lv_min_netwr TYPE netwr,
      lv_ebelp     TYPE ebelp.

START-OF-SELECTION.

  SELECT * FROM ekpo
    WHERE netwr IS NOT INITIAL INTO TABLE @DATA(ct_ekpo) UP TO 10 ROWS.

*Signle Value
  lv_min_netwr = REDUCE #( INIT min1 = 99999999
                               FOR  wa IN ct_ekpo
                               NEXT min1 = COND #( WHEN wa-netwr < min1
                                                  THEN wa-netwr
                                                  ELSE min1 ) ).

*Signle Value
  lv_ebelp    = REDUCE #( INIT min2 = 99999999
                               FOR  wa IN ct_ekpo
                               NEXT min2 = COND #( WHEN wa-netwr < min2
                                                  THEN wa-ebelp
                                                  ELSE min2 ) ).

  cs_ekpo = REDUCE ekpo(
      INIT min = VALUE ekpo( netwr = 99999999 ebelp = '' ) "Initialize both netwr and ebelp
      FOR wa IN ct_ekpo
      NEXT min = COND #( WHEN wa-netwr < min-netwr
*                         THEN VALUE ekpo( netwr = wa-netwr ebelp = wa-ebelp ) "Selected Fields
                         THEN wa "Whole Data 
                         ELSE min )
  ).


Hamad

entry.title: Re: SAP Learning Introduction
entry.content:

entry.title: Re: Upload of Packaging Specifications in EWM
entry.content: 您好，可以分享一下EXCEL吗？

entry.title: Re: Replace the LOOP for REDUCE operator
entry.content:
Solution!

DATA: cs_ekpo      TYPE ekpo,
      lv_min_netwr TYPE netwr,
      lv_ebelp     TYPE ebelp.

START-OF-SELECTION.

  SELECT * FROM ekpo
    WHERE netwr IS NOT INITIAL INTO TABLE @DATA(ct_ekpo) UP TO 10 ROWS.

*Signle Value
  lv_min_netwr = REDUCE #( INIT min1 = 99999999
                               FOR  wa IN ct_ekpo
                               NEXT min1 = COND #( WHEN wa-netwr < min1
                                                  THEN wa-netwr
                                                  ELSE min1 ) ).

*Signle Value
  lv_ebelp    = REDUCE #( INIT min2 = 99999999
                               FOR  wa IN ct_ekpo
                               NEXT min2 = COND #( WHEN wa-netwr < min2
                                                  THEN wa-ebelp
                                                  ELSE min2 ) ).

  cs_ekpo = REDUCE ekpo(
      INIT min = VALUE ekpo( netwr = 99999999 ebelp = '' ) "Initialize both netwr and ebelp
      FOR wa IN ct_ekpo
      NEXT min = COND #( WHEN wa-netwr < min-netwr
*                         THEN VALUE ekpo( netwr = wa-netwr ebelp = wa-ebelp ) "Selected Fields
                         THEN wa "Whole Data 
                         ELSE min )
  ).

Hamad

entry.title: Help me for c_ts452 question
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Please, I need the correct answer for these questions: -

In which of the following situations can document parking be used?

Note: There are 2 correct answers to this question.

  1. An EDI invoice containing variances is received.
  2. Account assignment information is missing for a purchase order item.
  3. Account assignment information is missing for an invoice item.
  4. A goods receipt is posted for an item that needs a quality inspection.

entry.title: CPI expand query error
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to set up an API using CPI and testing it via Postman. Everything is working well except for sending a query with an expand parameter. In this case I am receiving the error "Could not find property with name: 'xxxx'". 
The query is successful in SAP GW Client. The navigation property does exist in the SAP metadata file but not in the auto-generated CPI edmx file.

Any ideas what's wrong?

Best Regards

entry.title: VPN or Public IP not available
entry.content:
Dear All,

We have a special case with customer where the customer has subscribed for SAP Private Cloud (Rise with SAP). When proceeding with VPN questionnaire the customer informed that they have no public IP or VPN. Now customer is asking for the following options:

Options for Public IPs:(suggestion from service provider)

  1. Lease Line:
    • Recommended for secure connections (commonly used by banks).
    • Installation timeline: 40-45 days due to the dedicated nature of the line.
  1. New Internet Connection:
    • Option to obtain 4 normal public IPs.
    • Installation timeline: Approximately 10 days.

Our PCA has suggested customer that the best option would be to obtain four normal public IPs from Etisalat (service provider), with an estimated installation timeline of approximately 10 days.

Before proceeding, could you please advise if there are any alternative solutions to VPN connectivity that we might consider? Are we in agreement to move forward with our PCA's recommendation?

Can someone please elaborate the importance of Public IP and VPN for RISE connectivity. 

Thank you for your guidance.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Use of Suitable quantity to derive maximum amount
entry.content: Hi, that's not possible yet. You can calculate the amounts independently in two different PES. But there is not yet any capabilities to compare them.

entry.title: Re: Hello SAP World
entry.content:
Hallo David,

I am asking for one free attempt voucher, I emailed digitalskills@sap.com and they said that  must enrol in the beginner corner and make a post then I should to receive invitation link theough private message.

entry.title: Re: Alerts for crossing yearly overtime limit in EC Time management
entry.content:
Hi Neelesh,

Thanks for the wonderful blog.

Is there any detailed blog on how to send out mail notification to managers if employee crosses certain limit of time on weekly basis.

entry.title: Re: Feature Request: Allow formatting for DURATION functions in SIGNAL
entry.content: Hello Anna, have you tried the "DURATION_TO_DAYS" function in SIGNAL? That should be possible to wrap around the duration that you see currently in weeks.

entry.title: How to enable the Custom field in Mass changes to Purchase Requisition App
entry.content:
Hi SAP team,


Hi have created a custom field and enable all related CDS view /Services, but still the custom field which i created is not available in mass changes to purchase requisition App.


Could you please confirm whether it's doable or not ,to extend the custom field in Mass changes to purchase requisition app.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to enable the Custom field in Mass changes to Pur...
entry.content:
Hi,

You may use the adapt UI feature in the app Mass Changes to Purchase Requisitions

The Adapt UI feature is especially relevant to the mass change apps, as it allows you to customize the app based on the purchasing organization requirements. In other words, using this feature, you can retain only those fields that are relevant or required.

Kindly check if you have enabled the odata service MM_PUR_PRMASS_UPDATE_SRV 

You cannot extend the app with BAdI's.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/be20d5fdfe08447cafb502011a384295.html

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Transfer from Old Profit center to New Profit Center
entry.content:
Hello, We have same profit center for different company codes. Now we would like to create new Profit center for each company code. How do we transfer from old profit center to new profit center. What are the options available? 

We have tried using 4KE5, but we always end up with an error 

No valid sender entries were found.

Message No. GA710
Anyone has a suggestion how to do this? or even how to resolve this error.

entry.title: Design Your Site With the New SAP Build Work Zone Experience last step not working
entry.content:
i followed this tutorial step by step but cant get the descriped functionality out of the last step. it just shows the blank mainpage that was already available.

Does anyone have a solution or idea why this doesnt work as described?

entry.title: Re: How to map the Archive server to Kpro in SAP S4 DMS
entry.content:
In OACT you need to use storage category DMS and probably to recreate in OAC0 another content server, for DMS, pointing to the same content server as your ARCHIVELINK one.

Then use that new content server in OACT for DMS.

You'll have to distinct content servers in OAC0, one for Archivelink, one for DMS, but physically they will be the same server.

entry.title: Re: How is the "Missing Hours" is being calculated in "Ma...
entry.content:
Hi Evans,

 

The logic for calculation of missing hours in the 'Manage My Timesheet' tile is.

Prerequisites:

  1. Availability Data (Target Hours that user has to be maintained for the Day).
  2. Timesheet Data (Recorded Hours that user recorded their real working hours for the Day)
  3. Duration which limit the past days for Missing Hours' calculation (This is in the configuration "Maintain Data Entry Profiles" for Missing Days - Default is 60 Days)
    The user can also configure the Missing Days by themself.
    Note: Current day hours are not considered for the Missing Hours.

Calculation is done as follows: 

  1. Duration days for calculating the missing hours is (Current date – 1 ) - Past 60 days or the configured missing days.
  2. During the duration, if Recorded Hours is less than Target Hours then it is considered as Missing Day.
    Missing Hours for that day = Target Hours - Recorded Hours.
  3. Current logic calculates and sums up the number of Missing Hours for each day.
    Finally, the total missing hours are shown within the app.

In case the user wants to check the Target Hours and Recorded Hours:

  1. Target Hours: Can be checked from CDS view I_TIMEOVERVIEWBYWRKAGRMTANDDTE.
  2. Recorded Hours: Can be checked from CDS view I_TIMESHEETRECORD.

 

Regards,

Akshay

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA service - requote a service quation with refe...
entry.content:
Hi Abhishek,
I don't want to answer for Vojtech, but I also have a requirement for requoting in the context of advanced exection.
Scenario is as follows:
1. We quote to service or repair a customer item. As this involves a lot of work steps and components, we use the advanced execution scenario.
2. the customer accepts the quote and we start the work.
3. As we proceed with the work, we discover additional defects on the object that need to be addressed, but which were not visible at the time as they only become apparent once we dismantled the object.
4. We now want to amend the original quote with the additinal items, and send the customer an updated quote.
5. If the customner accepts these items, we want this to be part of the existing maintenance order. This is a key point for us as this is still part of the same business transaction and its part of the same service job.

From what I can tell, you can only do a requote with the advanced execution scenario by creating a new quoation item with a new and seperate maintenance order. We want to requote using the existing quotation number and the existing PM order number.
Is there a way to achieve this?

Many thanks

Patrick

entry.title: Need Ability to Apply Different User Statuses to Multiple WBS Elements Simultaneously in SAP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently facing a limitation where user statuses can only be added to project briefs and are applied generally across the entire project structure. This restricts the flexibility to assign different user statuses to individual WBS elements within the same project.

In production lines, especially for tank manufacturing, having specific statuses for different activities is crucial for efficient project control. For example, in a tank production line, two tasks like bending sheet metal and welding can occur simultaneously, but each task requires a different user status to track its progress accurately.

Is there a way to configure SAP to allow different user statuses to be applied to multiple WBS elements simultaneously, based on the specific needs of each element?

Any insights or recommendations would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Edit BPMN Diagrams to adjust SAP Best Practice and Reference Processes in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: No Copy button available to Edit the Diagrams.

entry.title: Best Practices for Renumbering Accounts in YCOA and Chart of Accounts Management
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am looking for guidance on best practices for managing the chart of accounts, specifically regarding renumbering the necessary accounts.

Is the YCOA (Uniform Chart of Accounts) the mandatory operational plan, or is it possible to implement renumbering as needed? If renumbering is allowed, are there any specific strategies or recommended practices to follow in order to avoid disruptions in financial reporting and integration with other modules?

I would appreciate any advice or experiences on how to best approach this process.

Thanks in advance!

Bea

entry.title: How to retrieve data from a fieldymbol nested of deep structures
entry.content:
Hi *.

I am just working on nested dynamic structures as output of a JSON deserializsation.

At the moment I don't know how to retrieve the data from this nested dynamic structure as I don't see how to get down to the lowest level of the structure. Perhaps you have an idea?

Is start with lo_json_data as output of a deserialization method defined as type ref to data.

 

lo_json_data type ref to data.

field-symbols: <data>    type any,
               <objects> type any.

assign lo_json_data->* to <data>.

 

I can assign the reference of lo_json_data to a field-symbol <data> of type any to just have a look on the data structure.

As I know the structure of the JSON-File

 

{
  "objects":[
    {
      "object":{
         "properties":{
            "CbaseTypeId":{
            "id":"CbaseTypeId",
            "type":"id",
            "cardinality":"single",
            "value":"Cdocument"
            },
            "%CobjectTypeId":{
            "id":"%CobjectTypeId!,

            ...
            
            "%CcontentStreamDataLength":{
            "id":"%CcontentStreamDataLength",
            "type":"integer",
            "cardinality":"single",
            "value":47336
            }
          }
     },
     "pathSegment":"data"
     }
   ],
   "hasMoreItems":false
}

 

I can also define the (hopefully) corresponding ABAP based structure to be read bottom up:

 

types:
  begin of ty_table_line,
    tline type string,
  end of ty_table_line.

types:
  begin of ty_basetype,
    id          type string,
    type        type string,
    cardinality type string,
    value       type standard table of table_line with empty key,
  end of ty_basetype .

types:
  begin of ty_property,
    propertyname type string,
    property     type standard table of ty_basetype with empty key,
  end of ty_property .

types:
  begin of ty_object,
    properties type standard table of ty_property with empty key,
  end of ty_object .

types:
  begin of ty_objects,
    object      type standard table of ty_object with empty key,
    pathsegment type string,
  end of ty_objects .

types:
  begin of ty_table,
    objects         type standard table of ty_objects with empty key,
    hasmoreitems(1),
  end of ty_table .

 

 From the deserialization-Method I get lo_json_data as a deep structure.

The debugger shows me:

I  assign it to <data>. with  assign lo_json_data->* to <data>.

To show the structure of <data> I see the first level of the JSON-structure "OBJECTS"

When clicking on "OBJECTS" I get the second deep structure level "OBJECT":

The deep structure OBJECT again contains the deep structure PROPERTIES:

And the table PROPERTIES contains a undefined number of "basetypes" 

<DATA>-OBJECTS[1]-OBJECT-PROPERTIES

Every basetype is structured  with an ID, TYPE, CARDINALITY and a VALUE-Table, 

like the basetype %CSECONDARYOBJECTTYPEIDS as example.

<DATA>-OBJECTS[1]-OBJECT-PROPERTIES-%CSECONDARYOBJECTTYPEIDS

The VALUE can contain sometimes two ore more values:

<DATA>-OBJECTS[1]-OBJECT-PROPERTIES-%CSECONDARYOBJECTTYPEIDS-VALUE

I get stuck iterating to the bottom of the deep structures even though I know the structure is always the same.

<DATA>-OBJECTS[1]-OBJECT-PROPERTIES

Any hints or ideas?

entry.title: Kuok Group Singapore: An SAP BTP Adoption Journey with Migration of Workforce Mgmt Application
entry.content:
Kouk Group, one of Asia's most dynamic multinational conglomerates, is a leader in properties, logistics, hospitality, food, agribusiness and maritime. Kuok Group Singapore (the “Group”) is a conglomerate with diverse and global operations in maritime, real estate and digital infrastructure sectors.

This article narrates an adoption journey of SAP BTP, marking the collaboration between SAP and Kuok Group. The SAP team has been collaborating with Kuok Singapore to facilitate their transition of their applications and adoption towards SAP BTP. This includes demonstrating the potential of SAP BTP through enablement and proof of concept, with SAP BTP serving as the platforms for extensions for SAP S/4HANA Business Processes.

Use Case Scenario:

Currently Kuok Singapore uses a non-SAP application for workforce management in which HR personnel allocate projects for staffs based on their IN and OUT time. This process requires two tiers of approval before it initiates postings to SAP, generating project accounting P/L reports. This application was one of the selected use-cases to start their innovation and adoption journey on SAP BTP.

Solution:

Key considerations for building the proof of concept.

  1. Kuok Singapore wanted to assess the user experience of application that are developed using SAP Build Apps and SAP CAP.
  2. Evaluate SAP Build Process Automation for automating workflows and validations within the application.
  3. Options for seamless integration with SAP S/4HANA.
  4. Keep SAP BTP as the extension and integration platform for processes including SAP ERP business processes.

SAP’s Platform Architecture & Adoption team, part of the Office of the CTO, worked on accelerating the BTP adoption journey and developed a proof-of-concept for this business process utilising SAP Cloud Application Programming Model and SAP Build Process Automation to highlight the ease of development, user experience in line with SAP’s User Experience guidelines and seamless integration capabilities with SAP S/4HANA.

The SAP BTP Guidance Framework provides a central access point to build and run enterprise grade solutions on SAP BTP. The technical architecture has been developed based on this framework and this will be the guiding document for all future SAP BTP development in Kuok Singapore.

A high-level technical architecture of this scenario was as below:

 

 

Feedback from customer on the POC and way forward for SAP BTP Adoption:

In the recent SAP contract renewal from HEC to RISE, Kuok Singapore has purchased the SAP BTP cloud solution with CPEA Credits. This serves as the primary catalyst for quick innovations based on potential business use cases that enables us to fail fast and succeed faster. As at the time of writing this, we have already explored 3 business use cases on SAP BTP within a short span of 6-months, namely:

  1. Jobsheet Entry Sheet
  2. Material Reservation Form
  3. PR Request/Approval

With no skilled in-house technical resource, SAP CSP, Surya Lee worked with SAP BTP CSP, Rai Kamal Saha to collaborate with us to leverage on SAP`s BTP technical team expertise to build our first PoC on SAP BTP –  Job Sheet Entry. Uma Anbazhagan, the Platform Architecture and Adoption Lead worked quickly to assemble the technical team and shared with us the PoC project timeline and the architecture landscape.

The development team was agile and able to build and deliver the prototype based on our prototype requirements within 4 months timelines with a development effort of 8 weeks.

  1. A sleek, modernized and user-friendly UI via custom build application
  2. 2 layers of workflow approval via process build automation
  3. Seamless integration of Jobsheet entry posting in SAP S/4HANA

The prototype was indeed an eye-opener to what SAP BTP solution is capable of. It has proven to open the door of opportunities to explore potential business cases using SAP BTP technology.

SAP BTP’s seamless integration with SAP S/4HANA is a major advantage. The ability to build, extend, and innovate on top of SAP S/4HANA processes is simplified with prebuilt connectors, data models, and APIs. Most importantly, it ensures that business data remains stored exclusively in SAP S/4HANA (without being stored in the BTP layer), maintaining SAP S/4HANA as the single source of truth while preserving data integrity and security, says Jacqueline Beh from Kuok Singapore.

Next Steps and Plan Ahead

With the successful build of the Jobsheet prototype, the KGSg-SAP team gained confidence to propose to our fast-growing BU, K2 Data Centre to digitize their hardcopy PR/PO form request by leveraging on SAP BTP Solution. With the help of a new start-up company, Mark9, we managed to work with the Service Partner to build a prototype within 6 weeks to seek the successful buy-in of the BU. User was impressed with the modern and sleek but yet user friendly user interface.

Driven by business requirements, the project team works with business users and Service Partner to continuously fine tune the design solution. The integration capability of the BTP Cloud Connectivity enables the retrieval of PO Financial Authority Limit maintained in SAP S/4HANA and routing of PR/PO form for approval in BTP. Finally, the PR/PO form is integrated back as PO document creation/updates in SAP S/4HANA, as single source of truth for all POs.

With continuous support from SAP BTP expertise and our Service Partner, Mark9, Kuok looks ahead to digitize, automate and innovate in its next wave of SAP BTP adoption journey, says Jacqueline Beh from Kuok Singapore.

Credits

We would like to thank Kuok Singapore colleagues Jacqueline Beh, Siew Siew Toh, Prasanna Venkatesh Elumalai and Mohammed Vaseem. Their close collaboration in developing this proof of concept and subsequent steps on the SAP BTP Adoption Journey with SAP Build tools and services. On the SAP side, Many thanks to Rai Kamal Saha, Surya Lee for facilitating collaboration with all the stakeholders in this engagement, Mahesh Palavalli, Ajit Kumar Panda and Swati Maste for supporting the POC development and finally PVN Pavan Kumar, Anirban Majumdar for their leadership support.

Summary

Post the POC, the implementation will include integrations with the new HR system, integrations with SAP S/4HANA system and build additional approval scenarios with other validations and authorizations in place.

SAP Business Technology Platform offer the essential tools required to create, operate, and expand digital products. They also provide access to solutions and accelerators developed by their ecosystem, enabling businesses to easily innovate or source specific novel ideas to maintain agility. The SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) embodies this vision, serving its customers, partners, and SAP itself.

For an organization, who is getting started with SAP BTP Journey, this serves as a useful example which demonstrates how to leverage the platform to digitalize business operations, create straightforward automation scenarios, and integrate the SAP S/4HANA using the SAP BTP as an extension platform.

To learn more about SAP BTP, see the learning journey on SAP Learning called Discover SAP Business Technology Platform, a great introduction to BTP and the Intelligent Enterprise strategy to see what it’s all about for free or check out Develop Advanced Extensions with SAP Cloud SDK plus much more free learning at SAP Learning site.

To initiate your own adoption journey with us, please contact us on paa_india@sap.com.

entry.title: Hana B1 - Interactive analysis reports open blank documents or shows error
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a FP 2208 in a Hana system. When we try to open the Excel report and interactive analysis in the client the "Purchase analysis" report the excel does not show the pivot tables.

When we open directly the Excel report and interactive analysis app. We complete the log on information but we get an error message like "Data source initialization error".

The Excel report have been reinstalled.

Has this error appear to anyone?

Regards, Esti

entry.title: Request for Custom Field Editing in 'Create Billing Documents - F0798' Application in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We have encountered a recurring demand from our customers in Portugal for the ability to utilize multiple sales billing series (interval ranges) to accommodate invoicing customers for dates in the past. While this is relatively straightforward to implement in 'On-Premise' or 'Private Cloud' environments through the creation of custom billing document types, we have found it challenging in the 'Public Cloud.'

To work around this limitation, we created a custom field and custom logic using the Custom Field and Logic application, making it editable in the VF01 header data. We also implemented flexible numbering for billing documents. However, we still face challenges when attempting to achieve similar functionality through the 'Create Billing Documents - F0798' app, as it does not allow any data entry in the fields.

Is there any possibility of enabling custom fields to be editable/input in the F0798 application? This would greatly enhance our ability to meet customer needs.

Any insights or solutions would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you!

Bea

entry.title: Re: SAP Slipstream Engine: Keyboard opens automatically i...
entry.content: I think that will be difficult to do with scripting in the RF Framework as it is 250 screens and dynamically shown verification fields

entry.title: Re: Material de entrenamiento en Español
entry.content: Hola, podrias compartirme los manuales TB1100, TB1200 y TB1300 para SBO B1 9.3 en español? El correo sería ignacio.millan @ outlook.com
